2606.28813.title: Human2Any: Human-to-Robot Transfer via Constraint-Aware Compositional Planning
2606.28813.paper_summary: Human videos are a scalable source of supervision for robot manipulation, as they are abundant and naturally capture rich object interactions. However, transferring human demonstrations to robots remains challenging due to embodiment mismatch, scene variation, and robot-specific feasibility constraints. We present Human2Any, a framework for learning reusable object-centric interaction priors from human videos without requiring real-world robot demonstrations in the target task contexts. Human2Any represents manipulation through object-object interaction motion, capturing task-relevant scene changes while abstracting away embodiment-specific details. It composes learned interaction priors with robot-side feasibility reasoning and motion planning, allowing the same human-derived knowledge to adapt to different embodiments, scene geometries, and task contexts. We validate Human2Any across diverse manipulation settings, including real-world experiments on a Franka tabletop setup and an RBY-1 humanoid mobile robot, demonstrating robust interaction-centric manipulation without real-world robot training data. Project website: https://human2any.github.io/.
2606.28813.paper_summary_zh: 人類影片是機器人操作的一個可擴展的監督來源，因為它們豐富且自然地捕捉了物體互動。<lb/>然而，由於具身不匹配、場景變化和機器人特定的可行性限制，將人類示範轉移到機器人上仍然具有挑戰性。<lb/>我們提出了 Human2Any，一個從人類影片中學習可重用的物體中心互動先驗的框架，而不需要在目標任務上下文中進行現實世界的機器人示範。<lb/>Human2Any 通過物體之間的互動運動來表示操作，捕捉任務相關的場景變化，同時抽象掉具身特定的細節。<lb/>它將學習到的互動先驗與機器人端的可行性推理和運動規劃相結合，允許相同的人類衍生知識適應不同的具身、場景幾何和任務上下文。<lb/>我們在多樣的操作設置中驗證了 Human2Any，包括在 Franka 桌面設置和 RBY-1 人形移動機器人上的現實世界實驗，展示了在沒有現實世界機器人訓練數據的情況下，穩健的以互動為中心的操作。<lb/>項目網站：https://human2any.github.io/.
2606.28813.author: Shuo Cheng et.al.
2606.28813.authors: Shuo Cheng, Chuye Zhang, Alfred Cueva, Caelan Garrett, Ajay Mandlekar, Danfei Xu
